description: Each record is an open position. The main pipeline queries this table to find roles matching the candidate's parsed role type and scores skill overlap. Recruiters maintain this table — adding, closing, and reopening roles as the business needs change.

fields.name: Role Type
fields.notes: Must exactly match the options in Candidates.Role Type — the pipeline filters by equality

fields.name: Required Skills
fields.notes: Comma-separated keyword list used for skill match scoring. Example: Python, SQL, FastAPI, Docker, AWS. More specific terms produce more precise scores.
fields.example: Python, SQL, FastAPI, Docker, AWS, PostgreSQL, REST APIs

fields.name: Seniority Required
fields.notes: Used for display in the ClickUp task title and Slack reminder. Not used in the skill match filter (seniority is informational only in v1.0).

fields.name: Status
fields.notes: Only records with Status=Open are returned by the pipeline's Airtable lookup

fields.name: Date Opened
fields.notes: Used by the weekly pooled digest Zap (03) to find roles opened in the past 7 days

fields.name: Recruiter Name
fields.notes: Used as the ClickUp task assignee and in the Slack reminder greeting

fields.name: Recruiter Email
fields.notes: Set as Reply-To on the candidate acknowledgement email

fields.name: Recruiter Slack ID
fields.notes: Slack member ID in the format U012AB3CD. Found via Slack → Profile → More → Copy Member ID. Used for the step 17 DM.

fields.name: ClickUp List ID
fields.notes: The ClickUp List ID where CV review tasks are created for this role. Found in the ClickUp URL when viewing the list: app.clickup.com/t/LIST_ID.

fields.name: Candidates
fields.notes: Reverse link — automatically populated when Candidates.Matched Role is set

fields.name: Location / Remote Policy
fields.notes: Informational — surfaced in the ClickUp task description in future versions

fields.name: Notes
fields.notes: Internal recruiter notes about the role requirements, team context, or hiring constraints

views.name: Open Roles
views.notes: Default view for recruiters managing active roles

setup_notes: Populate at least one Open Role before testing the main pipeline — a zero-result lookup routes all candidates directly to Pooled.
Ensure Role Type values exactly match the options in the Candidates table — the pipeline filters by string equality.
Required Skills should use lowercase keywords and avoid abbreviations not used in CVs (e.g. use 'machine learning' not 'ML' if candidates write 'machine learning' in their cover notes).
ClickUp List IDs can be found in the browser URL when viewing a list in ClickUp: app.clickup.com/WORKSPACE_ID/v/l/LIST_ID
